positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a cosmic forest at twilight. The scene features bioluminescent flora, intricate root systems, and celestial fauna (such as glowing hummingbirds and ethereal glow-worms) suspended within a deep indigo and sapphire blue palette. The composition is highly symmetrical, utilizing strong silhouettes of majestic, stylized trees and meandering paths. The style should be a blend of Art Deco and high-contrast stained glass, giving it deep, saturated colors and sharp, graphic lines suitable for a repeating apparel pattern. Use dramatic, rim lighting to emphasize edges and create depth. Focus on high contrast and negative space.
